chunks.text: Viptos Demos These demos require that the AVR tools, TinyOS and nesc be installed. For details, see the installation notes for successfully running Viptos demos. Sensor To LEDs . Single-node sensing demo with a model of the physical environment. Sen

demo with a model of the physical environment. Send and Receive . Two-node radio communication demo with a sending node and a receiving node. Surge . Multihop routing demo with link visualization. Counter To LEDs . May take a moment to open This de
ounter To LEDs . May take a moment to open This demo is useful for people who want to create applications and generate nesC code, but not simulate in Viptos.
